distribution.title: Distribution
distribution.description:
Parameters controlling the initial scatter of the feature.

Properties:
• iterations (int) = 1
• scatter_chance (float) = 1
• coordinate_eval_order (enum) = xzy
• x (int) = 0
• y (int) = 0
• z (int) = 0

defaultSnippets.label: Distribution
defaultSnippets.description: Controls the scatter distribution of features during world generation.

description.title: description
description.description: Identifier for the Feature Rule and Feture to place.

conditions.title: conditions
conditions.description: Parameters to control where and when the feature will be placed.
